summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Admin Dashboard UI and backend APIs. All 26 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend UI testing verified all admin tabs (Overview, Users, Pharmacies, Drivers, Orders, Service Zones, Reports) are working correctly with proper data-testid attributes.

minor.issue: Admin login redirects to /dashboard instead of /admin, requiring manual navigation or ProtectedRoute redirect
minor.workaround: ProtectedRoute handles redirect, or user can navigate directly to /admin

issues: Console warning: Missing `Description` or `aria-describedby={undefined}` for {DialogContent} - accessibility improvement needed

backend: Admin Dashboard - Get dashboard stats with users, pharmacies, drivers, orders counts
Admin Dashboard - Requires admin authentication (returns 403 for non-admin)
Users Management - Filter users by role (admin, pharmacy, driver, patient)
Drivers Management - List all drivers with user info
Service Zones - Check availability by zip code
Reports - Get report for specific date
Access Control - Non-admin users cannot access admin endpoints
frontend: Admin login and navigation to /admin dashboard
Overview tab - Stats cards (Total Users, Active Pharmacies, Active Drivers, Pending Orders, In Transit, Delivered Today)
Overview tab - Recent Orders display
Overview tab - Today's Performance section
Users tab - List users with role badges
Users tab - Search users functionality
Users tab - Role filter dropdown
Users tab - User actions menu (View Details, Activate/Deactivate, Delete)
Users tab - User details modal
Pharmacies tab - List pharmacies with status badges
Pharmacies tab - Search pharmacies
Drivers tab - List drivers with status and verification badges
Drivers tab - Search drivers
Orders tab - List orders with status badges
Orders tab - Search orders
Orders tab - Status filter dropdown
Service Zones tab - List zones with delivery fees and cutoff times
Service Zones tab - Create zone modal with all fields
Service Zones tab - Search zones
Reports tab - Daily report with metrics (Total Deliveries, Completed, Failed, Revenue)
Reports tab - On-Time Performance chart
Reports tab - Deliveries by Type section
Reports tab - Deliveries by Zone section
Reports tab - Date picker for historical reports

action_items: OPTIONAL: Update LoginPage.jsx to redirect admin users to /admin instead of /dashboard after login
OPTIONAL: Add aria-describedby to DialogContent components for accessibility
critical_code_review_comments: All data-testid attributes are properly implemented for testing
API integration is working correctly between frontend and backend
Role-based access control is properly enforced on admin endpoints
seed_data_creation: Test zones created during testing are cleaned up automatically
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin Dashboard is fully functional. All tabs (Overview, Users, Pharmacies, Drivers, Orders, Service Zones, Reports) are working. Backend APIs at /api/admin/* and /api/zones/* are tested and working. Login flow works but redirects to /dashboard first before ProtectedRoute redirects admin to /admin.

mocked_apis.Google Maps API: Not configured - geocoding returns mock data
